tasks.label: Build React App
tasks.command: cd client && npm install && npm run build

tasks.label: Restart Server
tasks.command: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; node server.js

tasks.label: Restart Server (theme)
tasks.command: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node server.js

tasks.label: Build + Restart (polish)
tasks.command: cd client && npm run build && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd .. && node server.js

tasks.label: Final Server Start
tasks.command: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node server.js

tasks.label: Build and Restart Server
tasks.command: cd client && npm run build && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd .. && node server.js

tasks.label: Cleanup old files
tasks.command: cd "/Users/ace/Desktop/Individual Assignment FIN7900" && rm -f admin.html auth.html dashboard.html game.html glossary.html index.html laws.html module1.html module2.html module3.html module4.html module5.html privacy.html quiz.html references.html thankyou.html build.sh && rm -rf assets/ .venv/ && rm -f '.DS_Store' '~$N7900 Individual Assignment Requirements and Guidelines.txt' && echo 'Cleaned up old files'

tasks.label: Git Init
tasks.command: cd "/Users/ace/Desktop/Individual Assignment FIN7900" && git init && git add . && git status | head -30

tasks.label: Git Commit
tasks.command: cd "/Users/ace/Desktop/Individual Assignment FIN7900" && git config user.email "icyace007@gmail.com" && git config user.name "FIN7900" && git branch -m main && git commit -m "Initial commit: FIN7900 FinTech Security Training Platform"

tasks.label: Git Push to GitHub
tasks.command: cd "/Users/ace/Desktop/Individual Assignment FIN7900" && git remote add origin https://github.com/ZEREF007/fin7900-fintech-security-training.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1
